nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 河流
nodes.summary: 河流是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括北美黑鸭、斑頭綠翅鴨、斑頭鴨等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 蘇門答臘島
nodes.summary: 蘇門答臘島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括罗氏山鹧鸪、蘇門答臘山鷓鴣、長嘴山鶉等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马来西亚
nodes.summary: 马来西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括马来冠眼斑雉、婆羅洲地杜鵑、Short-toed coucal等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 瀑布雨燕
nodes.summary: 瀑布雨燕（Giant swiftlet，学名 Hydrochous gigas），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于马来西亚、蘇門答臘島、河流，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is the only member of the monotypic genus Hydrochous. It is found in Malaysia, Sumatra and Java, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and rivers

links.evidence: It is the only member of the monotypic genus Hydrochous. It is found in Malaysia, Sumatra and Java, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and rivers

links.evidence: It is the only member of the monotypic genus Hydrochous. It is found in Malaysia, Sumatra and Java, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and rivers

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is the only member of the monotypic genus Hydrochous. It is found in Malaysia, Sumatra and Java, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and rivers

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It may be threatened by habitat loss. The giant swiftlet has the largest average wingspan of all the swiftlets, at 150 millimeters. It is a fairly large swift that can grow to 16 cm in length
